name: Crockpot Meatball Stew
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Whole Tomatoes, Chopped with 2 tbsp Beef Granules
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef with chopped onion, egg, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper. Shape the mixture into about 24 meatballs.
2. Brown the meatballs in margarine; drain well.
3. Stir together tomatoes, water, beef granules, and seasonings.
4. Place carrots, potatoes, and sliced onions at the bottom of the crockpot.
5. Top with meatballs.
6. Pour tomato mixture over everything.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
8. Before serving, remove meatballs with a slotted spoon.
9. Make a smooth paste of cornstarch and water; stir into vegetables.
10. Cover and cook on high setting for 10 minutes to thicken.
11. Remove meatballs to stew and serve.
